name: OpenTTD
description:
This Docker will download and install the version of OpenTTD that you enter in the variable 'GAME_VERSION' (if you define 'latest' it will always pull the latest build, if you define 'testing' it will always pull down the latest testing build).

WEB CONSOLE: You can connect to the OpenTTD console by opening your browser and go to HOSTIP:9015 (eg: 192.168.1.1:9015) or click on WebUI on the Docker page within Unraid.

Update Notice: If there is a newer version simply restart the container to update it to the latest version.

ports.name: TCP - WebConsole
ports.description: WebConsole (by default, you can connect to the OpenTTD console by opening your browser and go to HOSTIP:9015 - eg: 192.168.1.1:9015 - or click on WebUI on the Docker page within Unraid).

variables.name: GAME_PARAMS
variables.description: To load the last autosavegame you MUST specifie the following in the GAME_PARAMETERS variable: '-g /serverdata/serverfiles/.local/share/openttd/save/autosave/autosave0.sav'

variables.name: Game Version to Install
variables.description: Define the prefered game version (eg: '1.10.3' without quotes) or set to 'latest' (without quotes) to pull the newest build.

variables.name: OpenGFX Version
variables.description: Define the prefered OpenGFX version (eg: '0.6.0' without quotes) or set to 'latest' (without quotes) to pull the newest build.
